title: CustomFontFix
description: Fixes Z-fighting issues caused by TTF font rendering in Minecraft, especially when using glow ink on signs. Optimized for third-party pixel fonts like 'Neo둥근모 Pro'. Some fonts may not display correctly due to inherent rendering limitations.
body:
# CustomFontFix
![Without Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0e3887b9ff4883b66b1527a63b7a6336e29f272.png)
![With Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74d462c70743417a414d92fac905fef4698144f6_0.webp)

Fixes Z-fighting issues caused by TTF font rendering in Minecraft, especially when using glow ink on signs.

## Features

* Reduces or eliminates Z-fighting on text
* Improves readability for pixel fonts
* Optimized for fonts like **Neo둥근모 Pro**

## Limitations

* Some TTF fonts may still render incorrectly due to Minecraft's rendering system
* Anti-aliased fonts are not fully supported

## Recommended Fonts

* Neo둥근모 Pro (best compatibility)
* Download Resource Pack: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1qopOgPFsHFJPploP9YKeqau3cmKpDkK3/view?usp=sharing

## Installation

1. Install Fabric Loader (>= 0.16.0)
2. Place the mod in the `mods` folder
3. Launch Minecraft


## Supported Versions

* 26.1
* 26.1.1
* 26.1.2
